chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Sanctity and Virtue of Medina

text: 3152 - وَ فِي رِوَايَةِ عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ بْنِ سِنَانٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : «يَحْرُمُ مِنْ صَيْدِ اَلْمَدِينَةِ مَا صِيدَ بَيْنَ اَلْحَرَّتَيْنِ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3152 - Abdullah ibn Sinan narrates from Abu Abdullah (as):
"It is prohibited to hunt in Medina what is hunted between the two Harras (rocky tracts)."
